options.text: No, I'm actually really bad at handling stress.
That's so kind of you to say—I'm still learning!
You're the calm one, not me.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'That's so kind of you to say—I'm still learning!' 是得体回应，既感谢赞美又不自夸。选项1是否定自己，显得不自信；选项3和4虽然不负面，但回避了赞美，缺乏互动感，不符合‘轻描淡写+感谢’的得体原则。
content.speakerText: You're always so calm under pressure—I admire that.
content.speakerTextCn: 你总能在压力下保持冷静，我很佩服。

options.text: Thanks! I learned a lot from watching you, actually.
I don't know what you're talking about.
Pro? I almost messed it up!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks! I learned a lot from watching you, actually.' 是高情商回应，既接受赞美又回赞对方，促进对话自然延续。选项1和4都是否定自己，不符合‘不否定’原则；选项3是完全回避，显得生硬不礼貌。
content.speakerText: I mean it—you handled that client like a pro.
content.speakerTextCn: 我是认真的，你处理客户像专业人士。
